faq.question: What is the warranty on Western windows?
faq.answer: Western Window Systems covers its aluminum systems with a limited warranty confirmed per product line. Deluxe Windows registers the product warranty after installation and helps Bay Area homeowners document claims if a covered issue ever appears.

faq.question: Which Western Window Systems windows does Deluxe Windows install in the Bay Area?
faq.answer: Deluxe Windows installs Western Window Systems windows across the brand's current lineup — architectural aluminum windows and moving glass walls for contemporary designs — and confirms series availability for each Bay Area project before quoting.

faq.question: How do I get installed pricing for Western Window Systems windows?
faq.answer: Installed pricing for Western Window Systems windows is prepared after on-site measurements: the current promotion prices installations from $549 per window installed (regular $915). The written quote itemizes product, labor, permits and any opening repairs.

faq.question: How long does Western Window Systems window installation take?
faq.answer: Most Western Window Systems window projects are installed within one to three working days once products arrive. Lead times for Western Window Systems orders are confirmed at contract signing.
